research_question: Before designing any new mixed score family, which individual price-volume signals show genuinely positive cross-sectional edge under the calibrated v7 operational contract, and which ones should be eliminated before family construction?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger medium-term momentum should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This was the foundational medium-term trend-strength signal and not an alias, direction inversion, or horizon-neighbor duplicate at the time of round launch.

signal_pool.interpretation: we are testing whether short-term reversal has standalone positive edge when ranked in the contrarian direction

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This represented a distinct short-horizon contrarian mechanism rather than a relabeling of the medium-term momentum signal.

signal_pool.interpretation: lower realized volatility should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This was the initial realized-volatility-level hypothesis and not an alias of any retained price-volume confirmation or liquidity-trend mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: higher trading liquidity should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This was the initial structural liquidity-level hypothesis and not a rename of any trend or amount-shock signal.

signal_pool.interpretation: more internally consistent recent trend should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced an explicit trend-quality mechanism that was not reducible to raw momentum strength alone.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger longer-horizon momentum excluding the most recent month should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the same trend-strength mechanism becomes cleaner on a much longer skip-month horizon.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as an explicit long-horizon variant to test whether the retained momentum mechanism thickens when the lookback window is stretched.

signal_pool.interpretation: a calmer short-term volatility regime relative to medium-term volatility should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This was a volatility-regime state signal rather than a simple volatility-level alias, so it deserved its own initial discovery budget.

signal_pool.interpretation: improving recent liquidity versus medium-term liquidity should rank higher

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This was a liquidity-improvement trend mechanism, distinct from the rejected structural liquidity-level signal.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated v7 0.70 ranking liquidity guard and same TopK=10 width
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same equal-weight daily Top10 extraction used by calibrated v7

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later family-construction round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative full-sample IC or inverted decile ordering should be rejected instead of being rescued by later extraction, turnover, or weight-mapping tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated v7 liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, or turnover-suppression changes inside this round.
Do not sweep multiple alternative directions for the same signal inside one candidate; if a reverse-direction hypothesis is desired, register it as a separate candidate.
Do not introduce PIT quality, value, or investment fields into this round.
notes: This round is intentionally discovery-oriented and does not start by creating a new mixed score family.
The purpose is to reduce research freedom later by first determining which atomic price-volume signals have credible positive edge on their own.
Candidates should be registered and run one by one under this frozen round contract rather than opened in parallel without review.

The first completed batch covers momentum_60_5, reversal_5d, volatility_20d, and liquidity_20d; the second planned batch expands the atomic pool with cleaner trend-structure and regime-style candidates before any new family construction.
